penalties.description: Minor deviation observed at several points around circle, estimated 1-2mm average

confidence_rationale: Video quality is good and task completion clearly visible. However, precise measurement of line deviations is challenging from this camera angle. Penalty estimation is conservative based on visible deviations.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter measurements at all 8 cardinal points due to camera angle and resolution limitations
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with smooth cutting technique and good instrument coordination. Completion time of 72 seconds falls well within expert benchmark range (60-90s).
strengths: Efficient cutting technique with minimal hesitation
Clean circular cut with no tearing or incomplete sections
Excellent time management within expert range
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining consistent distance from marked line throughout entire circle
Consider slightly slower pace at challenging curve sections to minimize deviation
